quotes.text: The future depends on what you do today.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.text: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
quotes.author: Robert Collier

quotes.text: Happiness depends upon ourselves.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.text: The best way to predict the future is to create it.
quotes.author: Peter Drucker

quotes.text: Life is really simple, but we insist on making it complicated.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.text: Turn your wounds into wisdom.
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.text: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
quotes.author: Arthur Ashe

quotes.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
quotes.author: Norman Vaughan

quotes.text: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.text: What we think, we become.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: Your attitude determines your direction.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
quotes.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quotes.text: Education is the passport to the future.
quotes.author: Malcolm X

quotes.text: If opportunity doesn't knock, build a door.
quotes.author: Milton Berle

quotes.text: A calm mind brings inner strength and self-confidence.
quotes.author: Dalai Lama

quotes.text: One day or day one. You decide.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.text: You are enough just as you are.
quotes.author: Meghan Markle

quotes.text: Happiness is not by chance, but by choice.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: Light tomorrow with today.
quotes.author: Elizabeth Barrett Browning

quotes.text: Small deeds done are better than great deeds planned.
quotes.author: Peter Marshall

quotes.text: The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
quotes.author: Dalai Lama

quotes.text: Make each day your masterpiece.
quotes.author: John Wooden

quotes.text: Leadership is the capacity to translate vision into reality.
quotes.author: Warren Bennis

quotes.text: Be so good they can't ignore you.
quotes.author: Steve Martin

quotes.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: You miss one hundred percent of the shots you don't take.
quotes.author: Wayne Gretzky

quotes.text: The harder you work for something, the greater you'll feel when you achieve it.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Nothing will work unless you do.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.text: Peace begins with a smile.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa

quotes.text: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.text: Action is the foundational key to all success.
quotes.author: Pablo Picasso

quotes.text: The expert in anything was once a beginner.
quotes.author: Helen Hayes

quotes.text: If you want to lift yourself up, lift up someone else.
quotes.author: Booker T. Washington

quotes.text: Every moment is a fresh beginning.
quotes.author: T. S. Eliot

quotes.text: Learn as if you will live forever, live like you will die tomorrow.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine and shadows will fall behind you.
quotes.author: Walt Whitman

quotes.text: Do not wait to strike till the iron is hot, but make it hot by striking.
quotes.author: William Butler Yeats

quotes.text: When you arise in the morning, think of what a privilege it is to be alive.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text: You become what you believe.
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.text: Change the world by being yourself.
quotes.author: Amy Poehler

quotes.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.text: Be kind whenever possible. It is always possible.
quotes.author: Dalai Lama

quotes.text: Great things are done by a series of small things brought together.
quotes.author: Vincent van Gogh

quotes.text: Education is not the filling of a pail, but the lighting of a fire.
quotes.author: William Butler Yeats

quotes.text: Happiness is when what you think, what you say, and what you do are in harmony.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.text: A leader is one who knows the way, goes the way, and shows the way.
quotes.author: John C. Maxwell

quotes.text: Success is liking yourself, liking what you do, and liking how you do it.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.text: The present moment is filled with joy and happiness.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quotes.text: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.text: Life isn't about finding yourself. Life is about creating yourself.
quotes.author: George Bernard Shaw

quotes.text: There is no substitute for hard work.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.text: No pressure, no diamonds.
quotes.author: Thomas Carlyle

quotes.text: Try to be a rainbow in someone else's cloud.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.text: Self-belief and hard work will always earn you success.
quotes.author: Virat Kohli

quotes.text: A little progress each day adds up to big results.
quotes.author: Satya Nani

quotes.text: The roots of education are bitter, but the fruit is sweet.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: Do one thing every day that scares you.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.text: Your life does not get better by chance, it gets better by change.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: Well done is better than well said.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.text: Let your smile change the world.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Motivation gets you going, but discipline keeps you growing.
quotes.author: John C. Maxwell

quotes.text: Don't count the days, make the days count.
quotes.author: Muhammad Ali

quotes.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: In a gentle way, you can shake the world.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.text: The best revenge is massive success.
quotes.author: Frank Sinatra

quotes.text: Mindfulness isn't difficult. We just need to remember to do it.
quotes.author: Sharon Salzberg

quotes.text: Work hard in silence, let your success be your noise.
quotes.author: Frank Ocean

quotes.text: Courage is grace under pressure.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: Live less out of habit and more out of intent.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: If you can dream it, you can do it.
quotes.author: Walt Disney

quotes.text: To improve is to change; to be perfect is to change often.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: A year from now you may wish you had started today.
quotes.author: Karen Lamb

quotes.text: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: The quality of your life is determined by the quality of your thoughts.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text: When we are no longer able to change a situation, we are challenged to change ourselves.
quotes.author: Viktor Frankl

quotes.text: Confidence comes not from always being right but from not fearing to be wrong.
quotes.author: Peter T. McIntyre

quotes.text: A positive attitude can really make dreams come true.
quotes.author: David Bailey

quotes.text: Lead from the back and let others believe they are in front.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: There is no elevator to success. You have to take the stairs.
quotes.author: Zig Ziglar

quotes.text: Nothing can dim the light that shines from within.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.text: Knowing is not enough; we must apply. Willing is not enough; we must do.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quotes.text: The beautiful thing about learning is that nobody can take it away from you.
quotes.author: B. B. King

quotes.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.text: Wherever life plants you, bloom with grace.
quotes.author: French Proverb

quotes.text: A happy soul is the best shield for a cruel world.
quotes.author: Atticus

quotes.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
quotes.author: Sam Levenson

quotes.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
quotes.author: Walt Disney

quotes.text: Be faithful to that which exists within yourself.
quotes.author: André Gide

quotes.text: The more you praise and celebrate your life, the more there is in life to celebrate.
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.text: The greatest wealth is to live content with little.
quotes.author: Plato

quotes.text: Productivity is being able to do things that you were never able to do before.
quotes.author: Franz Kafka

quotes.text: The best preparation for tomorrow is doing your best today.
quotes.author: H. Jackson Brown Jr.

quotes.text: It always seems impossible until it's done.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: The art of leadership is saying no, not saying yes.
quotes.author: Tony Blair

quotes.text: Live the full life of the mind, exhilarated by new ideas.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.text: Positivity always wins. Always.
quotes.author: Gary Vaynerchuk

quotes.text: Joy is not in things; it is in us.
quotes.author: Richard Wagner

quotes.text: The time is always right to do what is right.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.text: Be willing to be a beginner every single morning.
quotes.author: Meister Eckhart

quotes.text: The only journey is the journey within.
quotes.author: Rainer Maria Rilke

quotes.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: Confidence is a habit that can be developed.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.text: Either you run the day or the day runs you.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: The more serene your mind, the more skillful you become.
quotes.author: Ajahn Chah
